div.head: The Secretary of State to the Consul General at Peiping (Clubb)
div.p: 588. While noting urtel 1433 Aug 28Not printed. re disruption Mukden-Shanhaikuan rail line Dept disturbed delays Ward encountering leaving Mukden and desires facilitate his departure if possible. Wld appreciate ur opinion whether any or all fol steps wld be helpful. You will recall this connection Ward has specifically cautioned against impatience (Peiping tel 1136 Jul 7 to DeptNot printed.).

list.item: Public statement by Dept spokesman calling attention long delays Ward encountering and stating he has been instructed withdraw immediately with his staff and that US Govt fully expects Commies accord him facilities enable his compliance.
Message from you to Ward conveying Dept’s instructions he and staff withdraw immediately.
Communication from you to top Commie authorities Peiping conveying under instruction US Govt message along lines (1) above.

div.p: Wld likewise appreciate ur suggesting any other steps which might be taken facilitate Ward’s departure.
